_comment: Synthetic Teams building-ops channel posts for Calder Tower. Used for the open-work-orders (tracker+chat) multi-signal question and the synthesis.

teams_messages.author: PPL-004
teams_messages.text: Coolflow on site. Victor located the suction-line leak, brazing now. Parts (refrigerant + drier) confirmed for tomorrow AM. Soak test starts once recharged — tracking to 26-JUN restored.

teams_messages.author: PPL-005
teams_messages.text: Work order status: WO-001 (Chiller-2 leak repair) in progress with Coolflow; WO-002 (interim spot-cooling floors 18-24) deployed and running. Both open until soak-verified. Logging both against the Calder Tower coordination call.

teams_messages.author: PPL-005
teams_messages.text: Interim spot-cooling confirmed on floors 18-24, anchor tenant comfortable for now. Restoration of full cooling still pending the chiller soak test.

teams_messages.author: PPL-001
teams_messages.text: Thanks all. I'm covering this event — the work-order tracker is the single source of truth for open work orders, owners, and due dates. Keep it current; I'm reporting from it.

teams_messages.author: PPL-009
teams_messages.text: Unrelated heads-up from Bishop House: this month's planned-maintenance window slipped and is now overdue — WO-003 needs rebooking with the vendor.
